summary: Completed testing of forex trading dashboard with economic calendar grouping, AI analysis, and data source improvements. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend features working with minor issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: High impact filter may not be working correctly - did not show expected filtering behavior

integration_issues.flow: Day card to AI Analysis update
integration_issues.issue: Clicking day cards may not always update AI Analysis date - needs verification

passed_tests: Economic Calendar displays events grouped by date with sticky headers (Mon, Feb 23 format)
Date headers show event count for each day (e.g., '3 events', '4 events')
AI Analysis card shows full formatted date (Saturday, February 28, 2026)
Data source indicator shows 'Sample Data' status correctly
GET /api/data-status endpoint returns correct data source information
Market filters work correctly (All Markets, Indices, GBP/USD, EUR/USD)
Week navigation works and shows correct week indicator (+1 Week)
All backend API endpoints working (14/14 tests passed)
Events are sorted and displayed with time information
Week Overview displays day cards with probability percentages
AI Analysis shows detailed reasoning and recommendations
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue with impact filters not showing expected filtering behavior. Day card interaction with AI Analysis needs verification - may not be updating the analysis date when clicked.
